description.value: Price 11,350 gp; Slot armor; CL 15th; Weight 30 lbs.; Aura strong evocation DESCRIPTION This sturdy, unadorned breastplate has a +1 enhancement bonus on the Material Plane. On any Elemental Planes, or against attacks made by creatures native to any Elemental Planes, its enhancement bonus increases to +2. On the Astral Plane or the Ethereal Plane, or against attacks made by creatures native to either of those planes, its enhancement bonus increases to +3. On any other plane, or against attacks made by any outsider, its enhancement bonus increases to +4. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 5,580 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells plane shift
